zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Iwardby於1425年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾華頓時，他的父親John Iwardby Lord Of Quainton35歲，母親Lady Katherine Missenden17歲。他於1446年與Elizabeth Hampden在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾艾維比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1462年6月2日在英國倫敦享年37歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 布利德也斯 邱奇 福利特 史崔特。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Iwardby was born in 1425, in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Iwardby Lord Of Quainton, was 35 and his mother, Lady Katherine Missenden, was 17. He married Elizabeth Hampden in 1446, in Ewerby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 2 June 1462, in London, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, Middlesex, England.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Hampden en 1446, à Ewerby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 2 juin 1462, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ko.London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, M: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 브라이데'스 c후르치 플릿 스트릿
ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Iwardby(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 퀄인턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Iwardby Lord Of Quainton(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Katherine Missenden(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1446년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 워비에서 Elizabeth Hampden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1462년 6월 2일 영국 런던에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 브라이데'스 c후르치 플릿 스트릿에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Iwardby nasceu em 1425, em Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Iwardby Lord Of Quainton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Missenden, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hampden em 1446, em Ewerby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, M: лондон ст бриде'с чурч флит стрит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Iwardby родился в 1425 г. в местности куеинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Iwardby Lord Of Quainton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Missenden, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hampden в 1446 г. в местности ювирби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 2 июня 1462 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности лондон ст бриде'с чурч флит стрит, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Iwardby nació en 1425, en Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Iwardby Lord Of Quainton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Missenden, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hampden en 1446, en Ewerby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 2 de junio de 1462, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
